title: CTOV - Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks compat
description: Compatibility datapack between CTOV and Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks mod
body:
Add this datapack to the game to add compatibility between CTOV and Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks compat. You will find Clerical houses in villages. 1.19+ datapack is for Forge.

**Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks mod**

Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks mod can be obtained [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/irons-spells-n-spellbooks)

**CTOV mod**

CTOV mod can be obtained from [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/ct-overhaul-village)
